# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
Only the latest version of the AI DDR Generator is supported with security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please DO NOT open a public issue.

Instead, please send an e-mail to the project maintainer (Abdulkarim Shaikh) or privately report the vulnerability via GitHub Security Advisories. We will address the issue as quickly as possible.
